summary: Health endpoint latency regression under concurrent user ramp
short_description: GET /health remained successful but showed tail latency spikes indicating capacity stress.

evidence.observation: No hard failures but high tail latency and >6s max response time under load.

timeline.event: First extreme latency spike observed during ramp
Tail latency remains elevated while traffic increases
Latency partially recovers but remains above low-load baseline

recommended_actions: Profile health handler dependencies and reduce synchronous blocking calls.
Add connection pool and thread/worker telemetry to correlate spikes.
Define and enforce a p95 health latency SLO during load tests.
